query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_cases,
  SUM(CASE WHEN titleEs IS NULL OR titleEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_titleEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN descriptionEs IS NULL OR descriptionEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_descEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN legalBasis IS NOT NULL AND legalBasis != '' AND (legalBasisEs IS NULL OR legalBasisEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_legalEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `procedure` IS NOT NULL AND `procedure` != '' AND (procedureEs IS NULL OR procedureEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_procEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN examples IS NOT NULL AND examples != '' AND (examplesEs IS NULL OR examplesEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_examplesEs
FROM special_cases;

FROM special_cases;
